title: Doctest in wolftpm-tss lib.rs uses 'ignore' — will silently bitrot
description: wolftpm-tss/src/lib.rs line 12: the quick-start code block is marked no_run,ignore. The 'ignore' means it is not even compiled — type errors, renamed APIs, wrong import paths will all pass CI silently. 'no_run' is the correct attribute here (compile-checks but does not execute). Suggested rewrite: replace 'no_run,ignore' with 'no_run'; fix any compilation errors that surface.
